Documentation.long_help: Fuse multiple vtkPolyData inputs (each connection on port 0 is one region). Vertices from different inputs within the distance threshold are merged; vertices from the same input are never merged, even if that mesh has several disconnected pieces. A single input is passed through unchanged.
Documentation.short_help: Fuse nearby vertices across multiple input meshes (one region per input).

InputProperty.name: Input
InputProperty.Documentation: Add each surface as its own fuse region (Pipeline: select filter, then add further inputs to this property so they append as connections on port 0—not separate port indices).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FuseThreshold
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Fuse Threshold
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Distance threshold for vertex fusion. Vertices from different inputs (regions) that are within this distance will be merged. Same-input vertices are never merged.
